meta.scenario: GKE + expose service + GCP firewall (Cloudflare IPs) + CF DNS/cache + Sentry + GH Actions daily deploy + Slack + n8n → GitHub release + Jira (+ Bitbucket in bundled all-providers preset)

jiraDraft.summary: [Release stack] GKE + Cloudflare + Sentry + GitHub Actions + Slack + n8n + Bitbucket — end-to-end runbook
jiraDraft.descriptionPlain:
## Assignee
Daniel Smith — set Jira Cloud **accountId** via WORKFLOW_JIRA_ASSIGNEE_ACCOUNT_ID for API assignee.

## Due
2026-04-01 (seven days from workflow generation, local calendar date).

## Priority
High (see Jira API field priority in create payload).

## Goal (orchestration)
1) Stand up GKE and deploy a service; expose it with a Kubernetes Service.
2) Restrict ingress on GCP to **Cloudflare published IP ranges** where appropriate (https://www.cloudflare.com/ips/ (use published IPv4/IPv6 ranges on GCP firewall / LB allowlists).).
3) Cloudflare DNS (proxied) toward the LB/origin; tune **caching** to reduce GKE load.
4) **Sentry** SDK/chart on the workload with default org/project + release tracking.
5) **GitHub Actions** pipeline: build container and redeploy to GKE **daily** (schedule + kubectl/gcloud or deploy action).
6) **Slack** notifications to the **release** channel for each major step (build, deploy, DNS, cache, Sentry verify).
7) **n8n** workflow: on message in release channel → create an **official GitHub Release** (or tag) via API.
8) Optionally mirror CI artifacts or PR flow in **Bitbucket** (repos / Pipelines) if your org standardizes on Atlassian.
9) This Jira ticket tracks the above; labels identify each toolchain.

---
## Google Cloud (GKE / networking)
- `POST` container.projects.locations.clusters.create — `v1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/clusters`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.create — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.locations — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}/locations`
- `DELETE` container.projects.zones.clusters.delete — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.completeIpRotation — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}:completeIpRotation`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.nodePools.autoscaling — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}/nodePools/{nodePoolId}/autoscaling`
- `POST` container.projects.locations.clusters.nodePools.setAutoscaling — `v1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/clusters/{clustersId}/nodePools/{nodePoolsId}:setAutoscaling`
- `POST` container.projects.locations.clusters.nodePools.create — `v1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/clusters/{clustersId}/nodePools`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.nodePools.create — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}/nodePools`
- `POST` container.projects.zones.clusters.nodePools.setSize — `v1/projects/{projectId}/zones/{zone}/clusters/{clusterId}/nodePools/{nodePoolId}/setSize`
- `POST` networksecurity.projects.locations.interceptDeployments.create — `v1beta1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/interceptDeployments`
- `POST` networksecurity.projects.locations.mirroringDeployments.create — `v1beta1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/mirroringDeployments`
- `POST` networksecurity.projects.locations.interceptDeploymentGroups.create — `v1beta1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/interceptDeploymentGroups`
- `POST` networksecurity.projects.locations.mirroringDeploymentGroups.create — `v1beta1/projects/{projectsId}/locations/{locationsId}/mirroringDeploymentGroups`

## Cloudflare
- `POST` dns-records-for-a-zone-create-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records`
- `GET` dns-records-for-a-zone-list-dns-records — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records`
- `GET` dns-records-for-a-zone-dns-record-details — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}`
- `PUT` dns-records-for-a-zone-update-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}`
- `PATCH` dns-records-for-a-zone-patch-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}`
- `GET` zone-level-authenticated-origin-pulls-get-certificate-details — `zones/{zone_id}/origin_tls_client_auth/{certificate_id}`
- `GET` zones-0-get — `zones/{zone_id}`
- `GET` bot-management-for-a-zone-get-config — `zones/{zone_id}/bot_management`
- `GET` account-level-custom-nameservers-usage-for-a-zone-get-account-custom-nameserver-related-zone-metadata — `zones/{zone_id}/custom_ns`
- `GET` zone-lockdown-get-a-zone-lockdown-rule — `zones/{zone_id}/firewall/lockdowns/{lock_downs_id}`

## Sentry
- `POST` Create a New Project — `api/0/teams/{organization_id_or_slug}/{team_id_or_slug}/projects/`
- `POST` (DEPRECATED) Create an Issue Alert Rule for a Project — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/rules/`
- `GET` List an Organization's Projects — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/projects/`
- `GET` List a Project's Organization Members — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/members/`
- `POST` (DEPRECATED) Create a Metric Alert Rule for an Organization — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/alert-rules/`
- `GET` List an Organization's Client Keys — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/project-keys/`
- `POST` Create a New Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/`
- `GET` List a Project's Client Keys — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/`
- `GET` Retrieve a Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/{key_id}/`
- `PUT` Update a Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/{key_id}/`

## GitHub
- `POST` actions/create-workflow-dispatch — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/workflows/{workflow_id}/dispatches`
- `POST` repos/create-dispatch-event — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/dispatches`
- `GET` actions/get-private-repo-fork-pr-workflows-settings-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/fork-pr-workflows-private-repos`
- `PUT` actions/set-private-repo-fork-pr-workflows-settings-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/fork-pr-workflows-private-repos`
- `GET` actions/get-github-actions-default-workflow-permissions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/workflow`
- `GET` actions/list-repo-organization-secrets — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/organization-secrets`
- `GET` actions/list-repo-secrets — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/secrets`
- `GET` actions/get-allowed-actions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/selected-actions`
- `PUT` actions/set-allowed-actions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/selected-actions`
- `GET` actions/list-org-secrets — `orgs/{org}/actions/secrets`

## Slack
- `POST` chat_postMessage — `chat.postMessage`
- `GET` admin_conversations_ekm_listOriginalConnectedChannelInfo — `admin.conversations.ekm.listOriginalConnectedChannelInfo`
- `POST` chat_meMessage — `chat.meMessage`
- `POST` chat_postEphemeral — `chat.postEphemeral`
- `POST` chat_scheduleMessage — `chat.scheduleMessage`
- `GET` conversations_history — `conversations.history`
- `GET` admin_conversations_getConversationPrefs — `admin.conversations.getConversationPrefs`
- `GET` admin_conversations_getTeams — `admin.conversations.getTeams`

## n8n
- `POST` post_workflows — `workflows`
- `GET` get_workflows — `workflows`
- `GET` get_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}`
- `PUT` put_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}`
- `DELETE` delete_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}`
- `POST` post_workflows_id_deactivate — `workflows/{id}/deactivate`
- `POST` post_workflows_id_activate — `workflows/{id}/activate`

## Bitbucket
- `POST` create_teams_by_username_projects — `teams/{username}/projects/`
- `POST` create_pipeline_for_repository — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines/`
- `POST` create_repository_pipeline_schedule — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/schedules/`
- `POST` create_repository_pipeline_known_host — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/ssh/known_hosts/`
- `POST` create_repository_pipeline_variable — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/variables/`
- `POST` stop_pipeline — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines/{pipeline_uuid}/stopPipeline`
- `GET` get_repositories_by_username_by_repo_slug_commits — `repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits`
- `POST` create_repositories_by_username_by_repo_slug_commits — `repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits`

## Jira (meta)
- `GET` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueResource.getCreateIssueMeta_get — `rest/api/3/issue/createmeta`
- `POST` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueResource.createIssue_post — `rest/api/3/issue`
- `POST` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueLinkTypeResource.createIssueLinkType_post — `rest/api/3/issueLinkType`
- `POST` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueTypeResource.createIssueType_post — `rest/api/3/issuetype`
- `POST` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueResource.createOrUpdateRemoteIssueLink_post — `rest/api/3/issue/{issueIdOrKey}/remotelink`
- `GET` com.atlassian.jira.rest.v2.issue.IssueResource.getEditIssueMeta_get — `rest/api/3/issue/{issueIdOrKey}/editmeta`

## Notes
- ClawQL `search` results above are **candidates** from bundled OpenAPI; validate paths/versions before calling live APIs.
- n8n: design workflow with Slack trigger + GitHub “create release” HTTP node or GitHub app token.
- GitHub Actions: use OIDC to GCP where possible; avoid long-lived keys in secrets.

content.text: ## Assignee Daniel Smith — set Jira Cloud **accountId** via WORKFLOW_JIRA_ASSIGNEE_ACCOUNT_ID for API assignee.
## Due 2026-04-01 (seven days from workflow generation, local calendar date).
## Priority High (see Jira API field priority in create payload).

## Goal (orchestration) 1) Stand up GKE and deploy a service; expose it with a Kubernetes Service. 2) Restrict ingress on GCP to **Cloudflare published IP ranges** where appropriate (https://www.cloudflare.com/ips/ (use published IPv4/IPv6 ranges on GCP firewall / LB allowlists).). 3) Cloudflare DNS (proxied) toward the LB/origin; tune **caching** to reduce GKE load. 4) **Sentry** SDK/chart on the workload with default org/project + release tracking. 5) **GitHub Actions** pipeline: build container and redeploy to GKE **daily** (schedule + kubectl/gcloud or deploy action). 6) **Slack** notifications to the **release** channel for each major step (build, deploy, DNS, cache, Sentry verify). 7) **n8n** workflow: on message in release channel → create an **official GitHub Release** (or tag) via API. 8) Optionally mirror CI artifacts or PR flow in **Bitbucket** (repos / Pipelines) if your org standardizes on Atlassian. 9) This Jira ticket tracks the above; labels identify each toolchain.

## Cloudflare - `POST` dns-records-for-a-zone-create-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records` - `GET` dns-records-for-a-zone-list-dns-records — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records` - `GET` dns-records-for-a-zone-dns-record-details — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}` - `PUT` dns-records-for-a-zone-update-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}` - `PATCH` dns-records-for-a-zone-patch-dns-record — `zones/{zone_id}/dns_records/{dns_record_id}` - `GET` zone-level-authenticated-origin-pulls-get-certificate-details — `zones/{zone_id}/origin_tls_client_auth/{certificate_id}` - `GET` zones-0-get — `zones/{zone_id}` - `GET` bot-management-for-a-zone-get-config — `zones/{zone_id}/bot_management` - `GET` account-level-custom-nameservers-usage-for-a-zone-get-account-custom-nameserver-related-zone-metadata — `zones/{zone_id}/custom_ns` - `GET` zone-lockdown-get-a-zone-lockdown-rule — `zones/{zone_id}/firewall/lockdowns/{lock_downs_id}`

## Sentry - `POST` Create a New Project — `api/0/teams/{organization_id_or_slug}/{team_id_or_slug}/projects/` - `POST` (DEPRECATED) Create an Issue Alert Rule for a Project — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/rules/` - `GET` List an Organization's Projects — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/projects/` - `GET` List a Project's Organization Members — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/members/` - `POST` (DEPRECATED) Create a Metric Alert Rule for an Organization — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/alert-rules/` - `GET` List an Organization's Client Keys — `api/0/organizations/{organization_id_or_slug}/project-keys/` - `POST` Create a New Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/` - `GET` List a Project's Client Keys — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/` - `GET` Retrieve a Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/{key_id}/` - `PUT` Update a Client Key — `api/0/projects/{organization_id_or_slug}/{project_id_or_slug}/keys/{key_id}/`

## GitHub - `POST` actions/create-workflow-dispatch — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/workflows/{workflow_id}/dispatches` - `POST` repos/create-dispatch-event — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/dispatches` - `GET` actions/get-private-repo-fork-pr-workflows-settings-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/fork-pr-workflows-private-repos` - `PUT` actions/set-private-repo-fork-pr-workflows-settings-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/fork-pr-workflows-private-repos` - `GET` actions/get-github-actions-default-workflow-permissions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/workflow` - `GET` actions/list-repo-organization-secrets — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/organization-secrets` - `GET` actions/list-repo-secrets — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/secrets` - `GET` actions/get-allowed-actions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/selected-actions` - `PUT` actions/set-allowed-actions-repository — `repos/{owner}/{repo}/actions/permissions/selected-actions` - `GET` actions/list-org-secrets — `orgs/{org}/actions/secrets`

## Slack - `POST` chat_postMessage — `chat.postMessage` - `GET` admin_conversations_ekm_listOriginalConnectedChannelInfo — `admin.conversations.ekm.listOriginalConnectedChannelInfo` - `POST` chat_meMessage — `chat.meMessage` - `POST` chat_postEphemeral — `chat.postEphemeral` - `POST` chat_scheduleMessage — `chat.scheduleMessage` - `GET` conversations_history — `conversations.history` - `GET` admin_conversations_getConversationPrefs — `admin.conversations.getConversationPrefs` - `GET` admin_conversations_getTeams — `admin.conversations.getTeams`

## n8n - `POST` post_workflows — `workflows` - `GET` get_workflows — `workflows` - `GET` get_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}` - `PUT` put_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}` - `DELETE` delete_workflows_id — `workflows/{id}` - `POST` post_workflows_id_deactivate — `workflows/{id}/deactivate` - `POST` post_workflows_id_activate — `workflows/{id}/activate`

## Bitbucket - `POST` create_teams_by_username_projects — `teams/{username}/projects/` - `POST` create_pipeline_for_repository — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines/` - `POST` create_repository_pipeline_schedule — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/schedules/` - `POST` create_repository_pipeline_known_host — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/ssh/known_hosts/` - `POST` create_repository_pipeline_variable — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines_config/variables/` - `POST` stop_pipeline — `repositories/{workspace}/{repo_slug}/pipelines/{pipeline_uuid}/stopPipeline` - `GET` get_repositories_by_username_by_repo_slug_commits — `repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits` - `POST` create_repositories_by_username_by_repo_slug_commits — `repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits`

## Notes - ClawQL `search` results above are **candidates** from bundled OpenAPI; validate paths/versions before calling live APIs. - n8n: design workflow with Slack trigger + GitHub “create release” HTTP node or GitHub app token. - GitHub Actions: use OIDC to GCP where possible; avoid long-lived keys in secrets.

operation.description: Creates a cluster, consisting of the specified number and type of Google Compute Engine instances. By default, the cluster is created in the project's [default network](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks). One firewall is added for the cluster.

Creates a cluster, consisting of the specified number and type of Google Compute Engine instances. By default, the cluster is created in the project's [default network](https://cloud.google.com/compute/docs/networks-and-firewalls#networks). One firewall is added for the cluster.

Sets the locations for a specific cluster. Deprecated. Use [projects.locations.clusters.update](https://cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.clusters/update) instead.

Deletes the cluster, including the Kubernetes endpoint and all worker nodes. Firewalls and routes that were configured during cluster creation are also deleted. Other Google Compute Engine resources that might be in use by the cluster, such as load balancer resources, are not del

```
These are the repository's commits. They are paginated and returned
in reverse chronological order, similar to the output of `git log` and
`hg log`. Like these tools, the DAG can be filtered.

## GET /repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits/

Returns all commits in the repo i

Identical to `GET /repositories/{username}/{repo_slug}/commits`,
except that POST allows clients to place the include and exclude
parameters in the request body to avoid URL length issues.

**Note that this resource does NOT support new commit creation.**

Returns a paginated list of the pull request's commits.

These are the commits that are being merged into the destination
branch when the pull requests gets accepted.

Creates a new pull request where the destination repository is
this repository and the author is the authenticated user.

The minimum required fields to create a pull request are `title` and
`source`, specified by a branch name.

```
curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositorie

Creates a new pull request comment.

Returns the newly created pull request comment.

Returns all pull requests on the specified repository.

By default only open pull requests are returned. This can be controlled
using the `state` query parameter. To retrieve pull requests that are
in one of multiple states, repeat the `state` parameter for each
individual state.
Returns a paginated list of all pull requests as part of which this commit was reviewed.
Approve the specified pull request as the authenticated user.
